channel.title: X Feed Transfer Generated Posts
channel.description: Generated X-ready posts produced from source articles

item.title: OG surges 17.6% as smart money leans long; path to $4.50 in 10 days hinges on volume at $3.66. Will this breakout stick or retest $2.80? 🔥 https://Blockchain.News/news/20260415-price-prediction-target-og-450-within-10-days-on-breakout #crypto #trading #OG

item.title: 🔥 BNB burns another chunk toward a 100M target, deflating real supply as prices surge—and the clock keeps ticking. https://Blockchain.News/news/bnb-chain-completes-35th-quarterly-burn-1-billion #BNB #Deflation #Blockchain
